creator: agh@riseup.net
text:
I do not recall Alire failing on i386, however, that is good to know, because the handful of Ada ports that I have restored locally, all fail on i386 with lang/gnat12 over lang/gcc6-aux.

If you beat me to it, please mark the Port broken on i386. I will do the same with my current patches, and maybe a separate bug report can be created to track the issue.

Thanking you very much.
